title: Space name bypasses canonicalize_display_name allowing bidi/homoglyph attacks
description: In jmap.rs space_set, the space 'name' field is stored as-is without passing through canonicalize_display_name(). The contact displayName path correctly calls canonicalize_display_name() which applies NFC normalization, bidi control character rejection, and zero-width char stripping. DESIGN.md §'Display Name Canonicalization' requires this for all user-visible names including group/space names. A client can create a space with a right-to-left override (U+202E) or invisible lookalike characters in its name. Fix: run name through canonicalize_display_name() in space_set before insertion, and return invalidArguments if it rejects the name.
